supervisor.note: External supervisor can restart Codex rounds; state.json and git commits are the recovery boundary.

resume.new_terminal_entry: 读取 state.json 的 resume.startup_instruction 并执行，不要要求用户复制完整指令。
resume.startup_instruction: 使用 linux-alignment skill。读取 state.json 和 Documentation/Linux26-Roadmap.md，按 state.json 从 current_patch.status=review_clean 继续长期 Linux2.6 alignment。严格遵守 boundaries.stop_policy 和 execution_loop：一直循环执行 next_patch，跨 stage 也继续；每轮选择一个窄差异点，先读 Linux2.6 参考和 Lite 当前实现，写 Linux Alignment Report/mapping ledger，修改代码，运行 make -j4、make smoke-128、make smoke-512，更新 state.json 和 review 文档，commit，review，amend 到 review_clean，然后必须立即启动下一轮 patch 选择。只要没有编译、测试、review、roadmap 路由、Linux 对齐或破坏性操作错误，就继续跑；不要因为 stage transition、clean review checkpoint、successful validation、当前 stage 的窄项耗尽、需要进入下一 roadmap stage、final answer pressure 或模型回合边界而停止。只有 boundaries.stop_policy.allowed_stop_conditions 中的真实错误条件命中时才停止；如果停止，输出命中的具体停止条件。若没有命中 allowed_stop_conditions，却准备发送 final answer 或停止工作，这是 state violation，必须改为继续执行下一轮。

boundaries.stage_transition: When the active stage has no remaining narrow in-scope patch, update active_stage to the next roadmap stage and continue automatically. Do not stop just because the next patch crosses a stage boundary.

stop_policy.on_stop: State the exact allowed stop condition that was hit. If no allowed stop condition was hit and the latest build, smoke tests, and review are clean, continue the loop instead of stopping.

execution_loop.after_review_clean: Do not summarize and stop. Immediately select the next narrow roadmap patch and begin Linux-reference-first analysis.
execution_loop.before_final_answer_gate: Before sending any final answer, check boundaries.stop_policy.allowed_stop_conditions. If none was hit, do not send final; continue the next patch loop.
execution_loop.clean_checkpoint_action: A clean commit, clean review, successful validation, and clean worktree are only checkpoints for recovery; they are not completion conditions.
execution_loop.violation_note: Stopping after a clean checkpoint without an allowed stop condition is a process error and violates this state file.

hard_final_gate.final_answer_allowed_only_if: One of boundaries.stop_policy.allowed_stop_conditions is actually hit, or the user explicitly instructs to pause/stop/report-only in the latest message.
hard_final_gate.if_no_allowed_stop_condition: Do not send final. Continue by selecting or finishing the next patch step.
self_check_required_before_final: Check whether latest user message explicitly requested pause/stop/report-only.
If all checks are clean and no explicit pause/stop/report-only request exists, continue the execution_loop.
hard_final_gate.last_violation: 2026-04-30: assistant sent final after review_clean without an allowed stop condition; corrected rule requires continuing instead.

stage_plan.name: NVMe Host and Storage Debug Cleanup
Buffer Cache, Page Cache, and Writeback

current_patch.summary: Use Linux task_pid_nr helper in proc task dump PID output.

commit.note: The exact final commit hash is obtained from git log because embedding it would change the hash.

next_patch.candidate: Continue Stage 5 by auditing the next narrow task lifetime, wait, or signal difference against linux2.6 kernel/sched.c, kernel/fork.c, kernel/exit.c, or kernel/signal.c references.
